>===== Original Message From "Terry A. Johnson" <taj1068@mailer.fsu.edu> =====
Here's a neat opportunity to share some of your club's great Seminole
spirit!

Mike Palios is in charge of the parade this year, and together, Mike and I
are jointly extending this special invitation to ALL clubs to please join us
for the Sesquicentennial parade of Nov. 9th!

Please let me know if you are coming, for I might be able to help with
decorating your cars, and will ALSO want to hook up with each during
Saturday's pregame reception behind Garnet and Gold on Pensacola Street,
AFTER THE HOMECOMING breakfast Saturday AM.

We are strongly suggesting that if you ARE coming, bring your club banner,
and we can use bungee cords to attach it to the front of your cars!!!!!

If you or ANY of your club membership is coming in for Homecoming,
